data.title: In the past hour, the total liquidation of the entire network has exceeded 92.2183 million US dollars, mainly in the long position
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Coinglass data showed that in the past hour, the entire network’s liquidation has exceeded 92.2183 million US dollars, of which long positions have been liquidated for 90.2516 million US dollars and short positions have been liquidated for 2.5555 million US dollars.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: With the decline in US dollar export earnings, it is difficult for the market to support US bonds and US stocks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes said when interpreting the trend of US bonds and US stocks: "The Fed is running out of time, and the system is collapsing." From the chart, US stocks and 10-year US bond yields fell simultaneously, which is different from the old logic of "stocks and bonds falling together = good news". Hayes pointed out that the market has finally realized that if global US dollar export earnings decline, it will not be able to continue to support the demand for US stocks and US bonds, and "the game is over."

data.title: WLFI is suspected of selling ETH to stop losses, and the floating loss has exceeded 125 million US dollars
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a wallet suspected to be related to World Liberty (@worldlibertyfi) sold 5,471 ETH at an average price of $1,465 half an hour ago, cashing out about $80.1 million.
The address previously spent about $210 million to buy 67,498 ETH at an average price of $3,259, and the current book loss has reached about $125 million.

BNB Drops Below 540 USDT with a 3.21% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 09, 2025, 01:20 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 540 USDT and is now trading at 538.23999 USDT, with a narrowed 3.21% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Market Concerns Rise as U.S. Stocks and Treasury Yields Decline
data.description: According to PANews, Arthur Hayes has highlighted that the current market is experiencing a 'bad mode,' characterized by simultaneous declines in U.S. stocks and the 10-year Treasury yield. This trend reflects growing market anxiety about the economic outlook. Hayes emphasized that a reduction in dollar export earnings could lead to insufficient capital inflows into the U.S. market, undermining the support for purchasing Treasury bonds and stocks, which could signal the 'end of the game.'

data.title: Wayfinder Community and Wallet Quests End Tonight
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Wayfinder announced that its current community and wallet tasks will end at midnight Eastern Time tonight to promote the evolution of the task, and early participants need to complete the task before the deadline. It is worth noting that if the user deposits the chain native token (such as SOL, ETH), even if its US dollar exchange value has now fallen below the minimum requirement of US$10, as long as the required amount is deposited before the end of the task tonight and held until the token generation event (TGE), the task will still be recorded as "completed". Kaito's Yappers task will continue until April 13.
